features.newsWeatherDesc: Stay updated with news and weather

whatIsAI.title: What is Artificial Intelligence (AI)?
whatIsAI.intro: AI is like a very smart helper that lives inside your phone or computer.
points: It can understand what you say or type.
It can answer your questions like a knowledgeable friend.
It can help you with everyday tasks like sending messages.
It learns from millions of books and conversations.
It is safe, helpful, and always available.
whatIsAI.examples: Examples of AI in daily life:
exampleList: Asking your phone for the weather
Getting health advice from a medical app
Reading news out loud for you

voice.title: Voice Helper
voice.instruction: Press the button and speak your question
voice.notSupported: Voice is not supported in your browser. Please try typing your question below.

chat.title: Ask Questions
chat.greeting: Namaste! I am AI Saathi. How can I help you today?
suggestionList: What are good foods for seniors?

diet: Drink 8 glasses of water every day
Eat fruits and vegetables with every meal
Reduce salt and sugar in your food
Have small meals 4-5 times a day
Include dals, beans and green leafy vegetables
exercise: Do light stretching after waking up
Yoga for 20 minutes helps joints stay flexible
Swimming is gentle on joints and good for heart
Simple chair exercises if you cannot walk much
sleep: Avoid tea or coffee after 5 PM
Keep your bedroom cool and dark
A warm glass of milk before bed helps
mental: Talk to family and friends every day
Read books, newspapers to keep mind active
Learn something new - even a small thing
Play indoor games like chess or card games

robinhood.title: Modern Robinhood
robinhood.subtitle: Connecting helpers with those who need help
robinhood.mission: We bridge the gap between people facing financial hardship or injustice and those who genuinely want to help. We verify every case before it goes live, so your help reaches the right person.
robinhood.step1Desc: Describe your situation honestly. The more detail you provide, the faster we can verify.
robinhood.step2Desc: Our volunteer team reviews each case carefully to confirm it is genuine before listing it.
robinhood.step3Desc: Verified cases are listed publicly. Helpers can see your case and reach out to offer support.
robinhood.coverFinancialDesc: School fees, medical bills, loss of livelihood, disaster recovery, and similar urgent needs.
robinhood.coverInjusticeDesc: Land fraud, wage theft, wrongful dismissal, and other cases of injustice that need support.
robinhood.coverCommunityDesc: Shared problems in villages or neighbourhoods — water, sanitation, infrastructure neglected by authorities.
robinhood.disclaimerText: We do not handle health, medical treatment, or emergency services. For those, please contact a hospital or government helpline immediately.
robinhood.seekHelpIntro: Fill in the form below. Fields marked * are required. We will review your case and contact you if we need more information.
robinhood.placeholderTitle: e.g. Need help with school fees for my two children
robinhood.placeholderDescription: Describe your situation in as much detail as possible. What happened? What help do you need?
robinhood.placeholderName: You may use an alias for privacy
robinhood.placeholderContact: Phone or email — shared only after verification
robinhood.contactHint: This will only be shared with verified helpers, never made public.
robinhood.successText: Thank you for trusting us. Our volunteer team will review your case within 2–3 working days.
robinhood.successNote: If your case is genuine and meets our guidelines, it will be listed so helpers can see it.
robinhood.offerHelpIntro: All cases below have been reviewed and verified by our team. Choose a cause and reach out to help.
robinhood.noCases: No cases found for this category right now. Check back soon or submit your own case.
robinhood.helpModalTitle: Thank You for Wanting to Help!
robinhood.helpModalText: Here is how to get in touch and offer your support:
robinhood.helpStep1: Send us an email mentioning the case title.
robinhood.helpStep2: We will connect you with the person in need after a brief check.
robinhood.helpStep3: Your help goes directly to them — no middlemen.
